title: Choosing the Right Layout Mode
text: Choosing the Right Layout Mode Use the following guidelines to select the appropriate Layout Mode for your DSP based on your development scenario: Generated Mode: Use when building new applications with component widgets, requiring automatic HTML structure handling, and minimal custom layout requirements. Fragment Mode: Use when migrating existing DSPs to layout templates, combining legacy content with modern template systems, or implementing contained DSPs with custom layout elements. Full Document Mode: Use when maintaining existing applications without modification, requiring complete control over HTML document structure, or when no layout template integration is needed.
